title: IRIS patient 22
source_name_ch1: IRIS patient, PBMC stimulated for 6 hours with heat-killed H37Rv
characteristics_ch1: individual: HIV-infected patient placed on antiretroviral treatment
characteristics_ch1.3: protocol: stimulated for 6 hours with heat killed H37Rv
treatment_protocol_ch1: stimulated with heat killed kH37Rv (multiplicity of infection MOI = 1:1, H37Rv to PBMC) for 6 hours
growth_protocol_ch1: fresh PBMC were plated at 1x10^6 cells per ml, 5ml per well, rested overnight
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was extracted using RNeasy Mini Kit Spin protocol as per the manufacturer’s instructions
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cRNA were prepared according to the standard Affymetrix protocol from 6 ug total RNA (Expression Analysis Technical Manual, 2001, Affymetrix).
hyb_protocol: Following fragmentation, 10 ug of cRNA were hybridized for 16 hr at 45C on GeneChip U133+. GeneChips were washed and stained in the Affymetrix Fluidics Station 400.
scan_protocol: GeneChips were scanned using the Hewlett-Packard GeneArray Scanner G2500A.
description: Gene expression data from RNA extracted from PBMC stimulated for 6 hours with heat killed H37Rv
data_processing: The data were analyzed with using the PLIER algorithm on ArrayAssist Lite using default analysis settings
individual:ch1: HIV-infected patient placed on antiretroviral treatment
protocol:ch1: stimulated for 6 hours with heat killed H37Rv
